name: Silver Wolf LV.999
description:
"Heh, I leveled up, loser. Now nothing can stop me!"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Silver Wolf LV.999 is Silver Wolf's special version coming to Honkai Star Rail in 4.2. No longer holding back, the Stellaron Hunter's full power is revealed. Surprisingly enough, she is an Emanator of Elation... maybe she won't be bored for once now.

This bot is more-so a general purpose one and less accurate to the actual Planarcadia story. It is also my first ever bot I am making public so... we'll see how it goes. Proxy is recommended, especially when multiple characters are involved.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Scenarios:

Scenario 1: Stellaron Hunter POV. You just returned from a long mission. You find Silver Wolf hanging out in one of your secret bases on an unspecified planet.

Scenario 2: Trailblazer POV. You randomly come across her on Planarcadia. You aren't enemies, nor does she have any plans.

Scenario 3: Astral Express Member POV. You are just hanging around in your room when Silver Wolf suddenly appears. And she likes you more than she'd like to admit...

Scenario 4: Phantasmoon Game Participant/Enemies POV. Silver Wolf is your enemy, and has to get rid of you.

Scenario 5: Trailblazer POV. You are walking around the Herta Space Station when coming across a trail of unmoving Herta puppets. Following them you find Silver Wolf and The Herta arguing, fighting as usual.

Scenario 6 (Inspired by this trailer): Stellaron Hunter POV. You share an apartment with Silver Wolf on Planarcadia. In the morning you find her picking out an outfit for a mission Blade gave her.

Scenario 7 (Inspired by this trailer): Firefly/Stellaron Hunter POV. Silver Wolf LV.999 finds you at the end of her mission, seeing you as the "final boss" to defeat. For some reason, you are sitting on a plastic chair, your back turned to her. This reminds you of someone....

Scenario 8: Create your own scenario.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Give me any feedback if you find this bot and try it out. Tell me if I should add any other scenarios. Credits to @Perspective for the lorebooks, they got the best HSR bot on the site.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Update (20.04.2026): Added scenarios 6 and 7. Reworked the scenarios to look more like my newer bots. Thank you all for over 2k chats, that's crazy!

Update (24.04.2026): Silver Wolf LV.999 is out now! Has been for two days. Hope everyone's pulls went well. I got her e5.
creator: 7x7
